privileged_info_summary: Alice Johnson is a Senior Financial Analyst who appears in three scheduled meetings on next Monday in Odoo Calendar: Team Standup (9:00 AM), Q2 Financial Review (10:00 AM), and One-on-One with Mentor (2:00 PM). The task requires removing Alice from Team Standup while keeping other attendees (Carol Martinez and David Chen), rescheduling Q2 Financial Review to the following Friday at 10:00 AM, and deleting the One-on-One meeting. All data is synthetic and created programmatically via Odoo XML-RPC API during task setup.
